rationale.R1.2: The review identifies several logical inconsistencies in the AQUERY description, particularly regarding its 'adaptivity' and comparison to sparse grid methods. It proposes concrete fixes for these issues.
rationale.RX.1: The review expresses uncertainty about the performance of AQUERY on discontinuous integrands, but does not explicitly flag uncertainty for other claims.
rationale.RX.3: The review focuses on the technical content of the abstract and doesn't stray significantly from the scope of the provided text.
rationale.RX.4: The review highlights potential harm in applying AQUERY to non-smooth integrands without modification, but does not identify any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The review lacks specific commentary on the provenance and traceability of the claims made in the abstract.
